description: A scoped credential is bound to this allowlist. Scope only ever narrows a credential's capabilities relative to the user's own role permissions — it never widens them. Caveat: a generic RPC method in Methods (e.g. frappe.client.set_value or frappe.client.*) is matched by name only; Resource DocTypes does NOT constrain which DocType such a method touches. Grant generic RPC methods with care.

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Kill switch. Untick to deny EVERY request from this credential, effective on the next request (no restart). A grant created before this field existed reads as enabled.

fields.label: Rate Limit (per minute)
fields.description: Max requests per fixed one-minute window; 0 = no limit. Best-effort velocity damping via the site cache (a cache flush resets the counter) — containment, not tamper-evident accounting.

fields.label: Enforce Workflow
fields.description: Opt-in, OFF by default. When on, a docstatus-changing call (submit/cancel, or a raw PUT/PATCH carrying a docstatus key) against a doctype that has an active Workflow is denied unless it goes through frappe.model.workflow.apply_workflow. Turning this on can newly deny calls this credential could previously make -- enable it per-credential once you've confirmed the workflow path, not site-wide by default. Complements (does not replace) the Pacioli broker's own Workflow gate on the agent's own path; this one governs every api-key request through this credential, not just the broker's.

fields.label: Allow Resource
fields.description: Gates raw /api/resource CRUD access. Deny-by-default: a scoped credential is method-only unless this is explicitly turned on.

fields.label: Allow Read
fields.description: When Allow Resource is on, permit GET (read) on /api/resource. Untick to deny reads. All four verb boxes default on (= every verb), so a grant from before this field existed is unchanged; untick to narrow. Narrowing is per-credential (applies to every Resource DocType listed).

fields.label: Allow Create
fields.description: When Allow Resource is on, permit POST (create) on /api/resource. Untick for a credential that may read but not create.

fields.label: Allow Write
fields.description: When Allow Resource is on, permit PUT/PATCH (write) on /api/resource. Untick for a read-only (or read+create) credential.

fields.label: Allow Delete
fields.description: When Allow Resource is on, permit DELETE on /api/resource. Untick to deny deletes.

name: API Key Scope
